description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs four Rust test jobs, each using a specific Docker image. In the test stage add a test:beta job that uses the rustdocker/rust:beta image and runs `cargo version && cargo test --all --verbose`. Add a test:nightly job that uses the rustdocker/rust:nightly image and runs the same command. Add a test:old job that uses the rust:1.26.2 image and runs `cargo version && cargo test --all --verbose`. Add a test:stable job that uses the rust:latest image and runs `cargo version && cargo test --all --verbose`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
